terms.description: Extracted from the body text of the document
Extracted from headings or section titles
Extracted from the main title of the document
Derived from the file name or path
Extracted from document metadata fields like PDF keywords
Explicitly provided as keywords or tags by the author inside the document text
Extracted from identifiers like product codes, SKU, or ISBN
Any other valid source not covered by above categories
Unspecified or unknown source of keyword term
